summary.goal: Fix find_path to return None for unreachable nodes and emit a stderr warning instead of silently returning a singleton path
decisions: find_path now returns None for unreachable nodes; run() emits a stderr warning and falls back to vec![target] so context output still works for orphaned nodes

rejected_approaches.description: Return an error from run() when node is unreachable
rejected_approaches.reason: Would break UX for users with corrupted graphs — a warning with degraded output is preferable to a hard failure
